raw_consumer_statement: AMEX has allowed over {$4000.00} of charges from some company with a marketing subscription. I have XXXX advised AMEX that I did not provide my card to this company. AMEX claims that because the company has my address ( whcih anyone can look up on XXXX ) that it somehow confirms that I authorized the charges. I have repeatedly disputed the charges and will need to file a Georgia Bar Grievance against the XXXX XXXX XXXX AMEX for blindly ignoring federal law when it comes to the Fair Credit Billing Act. AMEX needs to stop discriminating against minorities.
